name: EcoFlow DELTA 2 Max Portable Power Station
introText: The EcoFlow DELTA 2 Max doubles the DELTA 2's capacity to 2048Wh with 2400W AC output — the best choice for multi-day off-grid power, full home backup, and powering high-draw appliances at $1,499 CAD.
whatWorks: 2048Wh is enough for 2–4 days of essential home power — refrigerator (40W), phone charging, LED lighting, and fans can run for 2–4 days from a single charge.
2400W output handles larger appliances — can run a portable air conditioner (1200W), microwave (1000W), and other high-draw devices the DELTA 2 can't.
worthKnowing: 23kg is heavy — not designed for carrying to campsites; this is a home emergency power station or vehicle-based power source.
Expandable with extra batteries — the DELTA 2 Max supports additional DELTA 2 Max Extra Batteries, doubling or tripling capacity for serious off-grid setups.

commonComplaints.title: Heavy at 23kg
commonComplaints.body: Moving the DELTA 2 Max requires two people. It's designed as a stationary or vehicle-based unit, not a carry-anywhere power station.

commonComplaints.title: Price is significantly higher than DELTA 2
commonComplaints.body: Double the capacity costs 50% more than the DELTA 2. Budget-focused buyers should evaluate whether the extra capacity is needed.

commonComplaints.title: Solar charging limited by input rate
commonComplaints.body: Even at 1000W solar input, charging 2048Wh takes hours. A full solar charge requires 8–12 hours with ideal panels.

verdict: The EcoFlow DELTA 2 Max is the right power station for serious home backup and multi-day off-grid use — 2048Wh and 2400W output handle appliances the DELTA 2 can't. If you're camping or don't need full home backup capability, the lighter DELTA 2 at $500 less is the better choice.

realBuyers.quote: Ice storm knocked out power for 4 days. The DELTA 2 Max ran our fridge, sump pump, and lights the whole time.
Use it to power our off-grid cabin for weekends. 2048Wh plus solar panels means we never run out.
Added an extra battery pack. Now have 4000Wh total. Not moving to the grid.

metaDescription: EcoFlow DELTA 2 Max review Canada: 2048Wh LFP, 2400W output, 1000W solar input. $1,499 CAD. Best high-capacity power station for Canadian home backup.
